overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy action game showing a character walking through a dark cave tunnel and emerging into a vast cosmic realm with floating rocks and a colorful nebula sky. The character stops at the edge to observe the surreal celestial vista as the camera pans upward to reveal the full expanse of the cosmos.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark rocky cave tunnel toward the glowing blue exit

entered.detail: jagged dark stone walls of the cave tunnel
jagged dark stone walls of the cave tunnel
bright blue-white light at the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dark cave tunnel with jagged rock walls on both sides. The ground is uneven stone, and a bright blue light marks the exit ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: cosmic overlook platform at cave exit

events.description: character exits the dark cave into a vast open cosmic realm with floating rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking to the edge of the rocky platform overlooking the vast cosmic void

entered.detail: massive floating stone platforms suspended in the purple cosmic void
swirling blue and purple nebula clouds filling the sky
bright white-blue energy portal floating in the distance
towering rocky outcrops floating in space

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the cave onto a rocky platform overlooking a vast cosmic realm. Floating rock platforms drift in the purple void beneath a swirling blue and purple nebula sky, with a bright energy source glowing in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: floating asteroid field with colorful nebula backdrop

events.description: character stops walking and camera begins tilting upward to reveal the full cosmic sky

agents.ego_description: standing at the platform edge gazing up at the vast colorful nebula and floating debris

segments.scene_description: The character stands still at the edge as the camera tilts upward, revealing the breathtaking expanse of the cosmic nebula. The sky fills with swirling blues, purples, and reds while floating rocks drift slowly through the void.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a dark cave into a vast, surreal cosmic expanse. It begins with the character navigating a narrow tunnel of jagged rock walls and uneven stone, moving steadily toward a bright blue light at the exit. As the character emerges from the cave, the environment abruptly opens onto a rocky platform overlooking a purple void filled with drifting rock islands and a swirling nebula sky. The scene then shifts as the character comes to a halt at the cliff's edge, allowing the camera to tilt upward to reveal the full, breathtaking scale of the celestial vista. Finally, the view expands to encompass the entire horizon, where vibrant reds, blues, and purples swirl across the void around slowly floating debris.
